composite_description: No drawdown signal. Conditions do not meet any entry threshold.
brief: BTC remains 14.8pp below the -35% drawdown threshold (worsening trajectory) and 4.3pp above the 40% volatility floor (improving). A crisis z-score below -3.0 would trigger CRISIS_ENTRY; alternatively, price recovering above the 200d MA would flip the regime and enable tactical opportunities.
